prediction.reasoning: ABT (Abbott Laboratories) is a large-cap healthcare stock with historically moderate volatility around 15-20% annually. For a 7-day prediction, I applied a daily volatility of ~1.2% based on typical healthcare sector patterns. The slight positive bias in the point estimate reflects the general upward trend of established healthcare companies. Confidence intervals widen progressively to account for increased uncertainty at higher confidence levels, with the 90% interval spanning approximately ±10.6% from the current price.
